milestone: 上传视频真分析（补齐两种输入方式的上传一半）

design.approach: worker reads the uploaded local bytes and inline-base64s them into a data: URL; Doubao (doubao-seed-2-0-pro) analyzes the data: URL directly. No public hosting, no object storage, no resolver.
design.size_guard: MAX_INLINE_UPLOAD_BYTES (default 60MB); oversize -> error_code upload_too_large -> friendly Bridge reply
design.spike_confirmed: doubao-seed-2-0-pro accepts a ~38MB base64 data: video URL and returns a real analysis (status 200)

notes_on_redaction: No account/password/cookie/token/URL/model key recorded. Model analysis stored only as length + sha256 + bounded excerpt.

deploy.method: LF-normalized upload to current release src + py_compile; rebuilt bridge (root_rebuild_bridge_fast.sh, for agent_persona) and worker (fast layered image over openclaw-video-video-analysis-worker:latest + up --no-deps --force-recreate, no --build)
deploy.result: bridge_fast_rebuild=PASS; worker recreated and healthy (no error logs)

local_tests: 308 tests; only the pre-existing unrelated identity-diagnostics failure remains.
key_validation: A 28.6MB uploaded mp4, sent through the real /uploads API, was analyzed by Doubao via inline base64 and returned a full structured Chinese short-video analysis (1936 chars). The upload path is no longer a placeholder. Oversize handling (upload_too_large) is unit-tested.
rollback: release src backups *.bak-20260610b; previous worker image id retained (untagged) for image rollback
